character.name: A cozy pixel art RPG
character.prompt: A cozy pixel art RPG character: a rounded head about half the character's total height, a compact soft body, and short legs. A young adult mender — gentle, warm, approachable, deliberately ordinary-looking craftsperson, standing in a relaxed front-facing idle pose. Light skin with a warm undertone. Medium-length, slightly wavy chestnut brown hair falling loosely around the jaw and neck. Blue eyes, clean simple face with no markings. Wearing a cream-colored tunic with a tan leather-brown craftsperson's apron layered over the top, sleeves rolled up to the elbow with a darker brown cuff detail. A worn warm-brown leather satchel is slung diagonally across the body, with a needle, a spool of thread, and small scissors visibly poking out of the top — the satchel must read clearly in silhouette. Soft rounded pixel art style, crisp clean pixel edges, no anti-aliasing, no dithering, warm inviting color palette, transparent background.
